tasks.label: Backup to Google Drive
tasks.detail: Stage all, commit, and push — triggers the backup workflow automatically
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m '${input:commitMessage}'; git push

tasks.label: Restore from Google Drive
tasks.detail: Triggers pull-from-gdrive workflow, waits, then pulls changes locally
tasks.command: gh workflow run pull-from-gdrive.yml --ref main --field confirm=YES; echo 'Waiting for workflow to complete...'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 45; git pull
